mentions.note: Lower-income consumers financially constrained; not shopping dollar stores as recession-hedge thesis predicted; inflation and tariffs broke value proposition.
Reported blowout quarter yesterday with sensational numbers and bright forecast; consumer resilience despite inflationary headwinds and fuel costs.
Up 18% on earnings; embraces lower-income customer base with 85% of sales at $2 or below. Proven ability to adapt to higher fuel costs and macro uncertainty through compelling assortments.
Ideal venue for less well-off given price increases; classic Wall Street economic deterioration proxy; should be bought not sold.
